name: Sunset Paradise Hotel
description: Nestled along the golden coastline, Sunset Paradise Hotel offers comfortable rooms with stunning ocean views, free Wi-Fi, and friendly service. Guests can relax by the outdoor pool, enjoy delicious local cuisine at the on-site restaurant, and explore nearby attractions. Perfect for both leisure and business travelers, the hotel combines convenience and relaxation for a memorable stay.

name: Ocean Breeze Resort
description: Overlooking the turquoise waters of the southern coast, Ocean Breeze Resort invites guests to unwind in elegant rooms with private balconies and modern amenities. With an infinity pool, gourmet dining, and easy beach access, it’s the ideal retreat for couples and families. The resort blends luxury and comfort to ensure a peaceful escape.

name: Hilltop Heritage Hotel
description: Perched in the scenic hills of Kandy, Hilltop Heritage Hotel offers cozy, colonial-style rooms with panoramic views of the valley. Guests can enjoy authentic Sri Lankan cuisine, take a dip in the serene pool, or explore the city's cultural landmarks just minutes away. Ideal for a relaxing mountain getaway.
amenities: Free Wi-Fi, Swimming Pool, Air Conditioning, Restaurant, Room Service, Spa, Free Parking, Airport Shuttle, 24-Hour Front Desk, Laundry Service, Mountain Views, Bar, Conference Rooms, Daily Housekeeping

name: City Lights Inn
description: Located in the heart of the city, City Lights Inn provides a stylish urban retreat with modern rooms, high-speed internet, and a rooftop lounge. Whether you're in town for business or pleasure, enjoy quick access to shopping, dining, and entertainment districts.

name: Tranquil Bay Hotel
description: Set along the serene beaches of Trincomalee, Tranquil Bay Hotel is a paradise for beach lovers and nature seekers. The spacious rooms feature sea views, and the beachfront restaurant serves fresh seafood daily. Perfect for those looking to disconnect and recharge.

name: Forest Edge Lodge
description: Tucked amidst lush tea plantations, Forest Edge Lodge offers a cozy countryside stay with wooden interiors, fireplaces, and garden views. Guests can enjoy fresh mountain air, guided hikes, and freshly brewed Ceylon tea from nearby estates. Ideal for a peaceful nature retreat.
